# Event Perfekt — llms.txt
# https://eventperfekt.net/llms.txt
# Last updated: 2026-06-15

## About
Event Perfekt is a UK-based professional event planning and management company
delivering weddings, corporate events, government programmes, and private
experiences across the UK and Africa. It also curates invitation-only leadership
experiences for women who lead.

Company entities:
- UK: Event Perfekt Global Ltd, 20 Wenlock Road, London, N1 7PG
- Nigeria: Event Perfekt Management Services Limited, 25 Kusenla Street, Lagos

Tagline: "…making yours perfekt"

## Sitemap
https://eventperfekt.net/sitemap.xml

## Primary public sections

### Marketing & Home
- https://eventperfekt.net/home — Homepage, overview of services
- https://eventperfekt.net/about — About Event Perfekt
- https://eventperfekt.net/contact — Contact the team
- https://eventperfekt.net/booking-enquiry — I Am Her registration form
- https://eventperfekt.net/consultation-request — Request a consultation or case study

### Projects & Programmes
- https://eventperfekt.net/projects-and-programmes — Full overview of public sector projects and programmes
- https://eventperfekt.net/projects/cefas — DEFRA / CEFAS Africa Regional Support Programme
- https://eventperfekt.net/projects/remittance — Remittance & financial coordination
- https://eventperfekt.net/projects/funding — Programme funding & development
- https://eventperfekt.net/projects/twinpay — Twinpaay cross-border payments platform
- https://eventperfekt.net/projects/twintrade — Twin Trade Global cross-border partnership

### Case Studies
- https://eventperfekt.net/case-studies/cefas — CEFAS Africa Regional Support (public sector)
- https://eventperfekt.net/case-studies/oxford — St. Anne's Ball 2023, University of Oxford (education)
- https://eventperfekt.net/case-studies/twinpay — Cross-border payments pilot (financial services)
- https://eventperfekt.net/case-studies/youth — UK youth charity repositioning (charity/third sector)
- https://eventperfekt.net/case-studies/energy — National energy corporation CSR events, Nigeria (energy)
- https://eventperfekt.net/case-studies/sector/public-sector — Public sector case studies by sector
- https://eventperfekt.net/case-studies/sector/education — Education sector case studies

### I Am Her — Leadership Wellbeing Experience
- https://eventperfekt.net/iamher — The Woman Who Leads the Room (main event page)
- https://eventperfekt.net/iamher/media — Media & press coverage
- https://eventperfekt.net/iamher/stories — Leadership stories
- https://eventperfekt.net/iamher/submit-story — Share your story

- https://eventperfekt.net/iamher/community — Community
- https://eventperfekt.net/iamher/card — I Am Her card
- https://eventperfekt.net/iamher/feature — I Am Her campaign

- https://eventperfekt.net/iamher/partnership/founding-assessment — Founding partner assessment

- https://eventperfekt.net/meet-the-room — Meet the women attending the room
- https://eventperfekt.net/access — Request access / invitation

- https://eventperfekt.net/360-booth-hire-milton-keynes — 360 photo booth hire in Milton Keynes & Buckinghamshire
